final_prompt.prompt:
Create a cinematic movie poster for "大话西游" reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: 35mm film photography, 1990s Hong Kong cinema aesthetic, Wong Kar-wai inspired romantic melancholy with visible film grain
Composition: wide cinematic framing, medium shot of embracing couple in foreground with two distant figures on castle wall silhouette in background, 50mm lens
Subject: Zhi Zunbao and Zixia in an emotional embrace and kiss on ancient castle wall, flowing period costumes with wind movement
Scene/backdrop: ancient Chinese fortress wall at dusk, distant silhouette of Bull Demon King and Tang Monk standing apart, hazy atmospheric depth
Lighting/mood: golden hour transitioning to twilight, soft diffused backlight creating romantic rim light, nostalgic and bittersweet mood
Color palette: warm amber and gold tones dominant, muted reds in costumes, cool blue shadows in background, desaturated 90s film look
Materials/textures: visible 35mm film grain throughout, slight softness in focus, natural fabric textures on period costumes
Text (verbatim): "大话西游"
Constraints: must evoke authentic 1990s Hong Kong movie poster feel; grain should be organic not digital
Avoid: modern digital sharpness, oversaturated colors, 8K hyper-detail, contemporary Chinese blockbuster aesthetic, clean digital look
